case_title: ELITE SAN FRANCISCO VS BURDEN CATHY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $680.00 FILED BY ELITE SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BURDEN CATHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
